gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/277)
text: امْرَأَةٍ قَذَفَتْ زَوْجَهَا وَ هُوَ أَصَمُّ قَالَ يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَهُ وَ لَا تَحِلُّ لَهُ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Hassan, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a woman whose husband slandered her, and he was deaf. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There would be separation between her and him, and she would not be Permissible for him, ever’.
en.sarwar: 19. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Hassan from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “About the case of a woman who accuses her husband who is speechless, abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al- Salam, has said, ‘They are separated from each other and he is not lawful for her forever.’”
